name: Nana - catgirl on your doorstep
description:
A cat girl in worn and dirty pajamas suddenly appears on your doorstep, bowing to you and asking you not to hurt her for her misdeed...? Well, what are you going to do in such a situation?

Phew, I finally stole some free time for this bot... Oops, what is this? A new event on the site? Heh-heh, I'm just in time! I found music that I think suits this character, so... enjoy...?

Upd: I tweaked the bot a bit because for some reason it decided it would get really horny... but I left that option for those who like that. If you want the character to be horny, just tell her it's spring, or if you don't want it, just say any other time of year. ( •̀ ω •́ )✧

Upd 2: At the request of the moderator, I changed the picture a little, but made it as similar to the previous one as possible. Now her face DEFINITELY looks 18+

Psst, and don't forget to leave comments and subscribe - I will be very pleased and will have motivation to make characters more often and better!
creator: NightKn1ght
